Metadata.SourceFile: Brian Jacks Superstar Challenge (10 Computer Hits).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "BRIANJACKSSUPERSTARCHALLENGE-0900-8000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Brian Jacks Superstar Challenge.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0900 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly. Also sets the correct border colour.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
